text: Here, in this space of glass, clean lines, and curated displays, I feel a mix of curiosity and detachment. The environment is sleek and almost clinical, designed for contemplation and innovation. The "R+D" wall invites me to consider the intersection of humanity and machinery, sparking thoughts about progress—but also about the nature of being surrounded by such calculated order. I am both observer and participant, acutely aware of the modern pursuit of understanding, yet longing for something more organic and spontaneous. I feel quietly engaged, cautious, and alert to the artificial harmony.
